name: Sniper
description: Now that's what I call stopping power. Kardel Sharpeye, the Sniper Locks onto a unit-targeted enemy. After a short aiming duration, Sniper fires a devastating shot at long range and mini-stuns the target.

abilities.name: Shrapnel
abilities.description: Grants all immediately upon acquiring the ability. Subsequent ability re-acquisition only grants the remaining charges.

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.description: Grants Sniper a chance to deal extra damage and briefly knocks back the attacked enemy unit.

abilities.name: Concussive Grenade
abilities.description: Damages, stuns, and applies a knockback to all affected enemy units within the area-targeted location. Disarms, and applies a movement speed slow to affected enemy units after the knockback.

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: Assassinate now fires quicker and stuns the enemy target. Reduces cast point. applies a visual indicator above the unit-targeted enemy.
